description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'CI: hardware options tests' that runs on push to master and main branches, on pull request open and synchronize, on merge group checks requested, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow checks for changed files using a reusable workflow, then tests with different hardware and parallelism options in a matrix. For each combination, it checks out the repository, sets up Bazel and Python with caching, installs dependencies, runs C++ tests, and executes a sample simulation.
